release_notes:
✨ What's New in v1.2.1:

🎨 UI & Experience:
- Enhanced app interface with modern, smooth visual touches for a better and highly satisfying browsing experience.

🤖 Smart Servers:
- Rebuilt the Server Selection BottomSheet to automatically pick the most accurate result powered by a new customizable 'Match Probability' algorithm.

📺 More Sources:
- Integrated new and exclusive server sources to expand the watch library without playback interruptions.

⚡ Performance & Fixes:
- Crushed numerous bugs and optimized resource consumption to drastically eliminate lag, even on lower-end devices.
- Modernized the 'App Update' screen interface to keep you rapidly updated with our latest features.
